{{Infobox concept
| name = Forged
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Forged Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forging]] is a versatile technique used to manifest physical objects, structures, or enhancements from [[madra]] and [[aura]]. Practitioners can create a wide variety of items, including weaponry such as blades, spears, axes, and massive claws, as well as defensive tools like shields, walls, and armor. Beyond physical objects, the process can produce complex constructs like illusory arrows that fracture space, giant hands, or even entire stars. Some techniques allow for the enlargement of existing weapons, such as the [[Titan’s Blade]], which can quadruple a [[sword]]'s size. The quality and stability of a Forged creation depend on several factors, including the density of the [[madra]] used, the skill of the practitioner, and the time taken to complete the process. Rapidly produced items may be unstable or short-lived, whereas carefully crafted objects can be highly durable and detailed. Creating high-level Forged items can place significant strain on a user's madra channels, potentially causing permanent damage if done excessively. Advanced [[Soulsmithing]] may involve specialized tools like hammers to inject a creator's will into an object, or the use of unique locations like the [[Soulforge]] to imbue items with greater authority and power.}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Striker techniques]] are not [[Forged]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c1">''Ghostwater'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Harmony]] released [[Forged]] black blades.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Highgold]] man held a [[Forged sword]] of pale light.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Forged hand]] followed [[Lindon]]'s palm motion.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Jai Long]] has [[Forged]] a circle that hovers over his head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wandering Titan]] hurls golden [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Forged madra]] manifests as blue-green leaves etched with an eye.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Sha Miara]] carries a [[Forged blade]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
